projectDescription: Shenzhen Topleo Technology Co., Ltd. is a leading OEM/ODM manufacturer of smart LCD and DLP projectors, offering 27 models with Google TV, Netflix, and Android certifications for global distributors and buyers.
keyFeatures: 27 smart projector models covering portable, home theater, and short-throw categories
Google TV (GTV) certified models with full Android TV experience
Netflix certified models for native streaming membership
Auto focus, auto keystone correction, auto obstacle avoidance
Short-throw and ultra-short-throw options (throw ratio as low as 0.45:1)
≥50,000 hour lamp life across all LCD models
OEM/ODM customization with PCBA sample in 24 hrs and mass production in 7 working days
ISO9001, CE, FCC, UKCA, RoHS, and other global certifications
US and Poland overseas warehouses with DDP/DDU shipping support
